metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced managerial accounting skills for analyzing costs, planning budgets, and making financial decisions within organizations. This course emphasizes cost analysis, budgeting techniques, and using financial information for internal decision-making and performance evaluation.
metadata.general_description: Advanced managerial accounting, cost analysis, budgeting, and financial decision-making for organizational management.

big_ideas.statement: Cost analysis provides managers with detailed understanding of how costs behave and impact profitability
big_ideas.elaboration: By analyzing fixed costs, variable costs, and cost drivers, managers can make informed decisions about pricing, production, and resource allocation.

big_ideas.statement: Budgeting translates organizational strategy into financial plans and performance benchmarks
big_ideas.elaboration: Budgets serve as communication tools, coordination mechanisms, and evaluation standards for organizational performance.

big_ideas.statement: Relevant financial information guides short-term tactical decisions and long-term strategic choices
big_ideas.elaboration: Managers must distinguish between relevant and irrelevant costs when evaluating alternatives and making capital investment decisions.

big_ideas.statement: Performance evaluation systems motivate behavior and hold managers accountable for results
big_ideas.elaboration: Well-designed systems balance multiple performance dimensions and align individual incentives with organizational objectives.

competencies.raw: Design cost accounting systems that capture and classify organizational costs
i_can_statements: I can design job order and process costing systems
I can develop cost allocation methods for accurate product costing
I can create systems to capture and track direct and indirect costs
I can design activity-based costing systems

competencies.raw: Design comprehensive budgets and financial forecasts
i_can_statements: I can develop master budgets integrating multiple functional areas
I can create cash flow projections and manage working capital
I can design flexible budgets for different activity levels
I can develop rolling forecasts and contingency budgets

competencies.raw: Design decision-making frameworks for capital investments and resource allocation
i_can_statements: I can develop analysis frameworks for capital budgeting decisions
I can design make-or-buy and outsourcing decision analyses
I can create pricing decision frameworks
I can develop special order evaluation procedures

competencies.raw: Design performance evaluation and responsibility accounting systems
i_can_statements: I can design cost center, profit center, and investment center evaluations
I can develop balanced scorecard systems
I can create variance analysis frameworks
I can design incentive and reward systems

competencies.raw: Apply cost analysis techniques to understand organizational profitability
i_can_statements: I can classify and analyze fixed, variable, and mixed costs
I can perform cost-volume-profit analysis
I can calculate contribution margins and break-even points
I can conduct sensitivity analysis for cost structures

competencies.raw: Apply budgeting and forecasting techniques to plan organizational activities
i_can_statements: I can prepare operating budgets for different functional areas
I can develop cash flow budgets and forecasts
I can analyze budget variances and identify causes
I can adjust budgets based on changing conditions

competencies.raw: Apply relevant cost analysis to make tactical and strategic decisions
i_can_statements: I can identify relevant costs for specific decisions
I can evaluate capital investment alternatives using NPV and IRR
I can analyze pricing decisions considering cost structures
I can evaluate make-or-buy and outsourcing decisions

competencies.raw: Apply performance measurement techniques to evaluate organizational results
i_can_statements: I can calculate and analyze favorable and unfavorable variances
I can evaluate responsibility center performance
I can analyze key performance indicators and metrics
I can provide performance feedback to management

competencies.raw: Use cost accounting software and systems effectively
i_can_statements: I can use cost accounting modules in enterprise systems
I can input and manage cost data in accounting applications
I can generate cost reports and analyses
I can track and allocate costs across cost objects

competencies.raw: Use spreadsheets and business intelligence tools for financial analysis
i_can_statements: I can build budget models in spreadsheets
I can create variance analysis and dashboard tools
I can use visualization tools to present financial results
I can automate financial reporting and analysis

competencies.raw: Use financial modeling tools for forecasting and scenario analysis
i_can_statements: I can build comprehensive financial models
I can conduct scenario analysis and sensitivity testing
I can use forecasting tools to predict financial outcomes
I can integrate external data into financial models

competencies.raw: Use data visualization and reporting technologies
i_can_statements: I can create professional financial reports
I can develop dashboards for performance monitoring
I can use business intelligence tools for analysis
I can present financial information effectively using technology

areas.name: Cost Analysis and Cost Behavior
topics: Fixed, variable, and mixed cost identification and analysis
Cost classification for different management purposes

areas.name: Budgeting and Forecasting
topics: Operating budgets: sales, production, and expense budgets
Cash flow budgeting and working capital management

areas.name: Decision Analysis and Capital Budgeting
topics: Time value of money and present value calculations
Capital investment evaluation: NPV, IRR, and payback methods
Pricing decisions and product line analysis
Special order and segment profitability analysis

areas.name: Performance Evaluation and Control
topics: Variance analysis: budget, efficiency, and quantity variances
